items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a customer views corporate vs local reporting split. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or results related to this reporting functionality. The prior steps focus on booking and payment processes but do not address the reporting aspect, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the coverage of this requirement.
